title: 检索2025年研报中提到人工智能产业升级相关布局... - 销售费用

meta.source_sql:
WITH target_companies AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT stock_code, stock_abbr
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE stock_abbr IN ('方盛制药')
)
SELECT 
    fv.stock_code,
    fv.stock_abbr,
    fv.report_period,
    -- 销售费用率 = 销售费用 / 营业总收入，已存储为百分数，直接使用
    fv.selling_expenses AS selling_expense_ratio,
    -- 获取上一季度（2025Q2）的销售费用率用于计算变化
    LAG(fv.selling_expenses) OVER (PARTITION BY fv.stock_code ORDER BY fv.report_period) AS prev_selling_expense_ratio,
    -- 计算环比变化（百分点）
    fv.selling_expenses - LAG(fv.selling_expenses) OVER (PARTITION BY fv.stock_code ORDER BY fv.report_period) AS selling_expense_ratio_change
FROM financials_view fv
INNER JOIN target_companies tc ON fv.stock_code = tc.stock_code
WHERE fv.report_period IN ('2025Q3', '2025Q2')
ORDER BY fv.stock_abbr, fv.report_period;
